name: st-rpg-hud
author: System
description: RPG HUD v4.1: token-saver core (delta-only, tiered, adaptive, off-scene lorebook, heartbeat) + immersion (TIER 4 dynamic cues, NPC return callbacks, stagnation nudges, time-skip, relationship milestones, persona drift, scene transitions) + STATS UPDATE bridge to ff4-vir + slash commands + per-chat rule overlay + rule lorebook export + World Sim tab.
